title: Nototriche pichinchensis
intro: Nototriche pichinchensis, commonly known as Pichinchensis, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family, traditionally used in medicine. The health benefits of Nototriche pichinchensis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce the severity of certain infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Nototriche pichinchensis is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, gastrointestinal issues, and skin conditions.
